changeSet.author: hdosprazeres
changeSet.sql: UPDATE data_export SET schema = jsonb_build_object( source, CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NOT NULL AND array_length(column_aliases, 1) > 0 AND array_to_string(column_aliases, '') != '' THEN jsonb_build_object( 'columns', to_jsonb(columns), 'aliases', to_jsonb(column_aliases) ) ELSE jsonb_build_object( 'columns', to_jsonb(columns) ) END ) WHERE columns IS NOT NULL AND array_length(columns, 1) > 0;

changeSet.author: hdosprazeres
changeSet.sql: UPDATE data_export_template SET schema = jsonb_build_object( 'material-sample', CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NOT NULL AND array_length(column_aliases, 1) > 0 AND array_to_string(column_aliases, '') != '' THEN jsonb_build_object( 'columns', to_jsonb(columns), 'aliases', to_jsonb(column_aliases) ) ELSE jsonb_build_object( 'columns', to_jsonb(columns) ) END ) WHERE columns IS NOT NULL AND array_length(columns, 1) > 0;

changeSet.author: hdosprazeres
hdosprazeres
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE data_export DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS columns, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS column_aliases, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS column_functions;

changeSet.author: hdosprazeres
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE data_export_template DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS columns, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS column_aliases, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS column_functions;
